name: Yayoi
description: Japans largest accounting software vendor — desktop and cloud (Yayoi Online) with MISOCA e-invoice API.

seo.title: Yayoi — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Yayoi: Japans largest accounting software vendor — desktop and cloud (Yayoi Online) with MISOCA e-invoice API.

when_to_use: Japanese e-invoice generation via MISOCA API
Cloud accounting sync for Japanese SMB via Yayoi Online
Automated bookkeeping and tax filing for Japanese freelancers

pros: Dominant JP accounting brand with huge install base
Both desktop and cloud (Yayoi Online) options
Wide SMB ecosystem and partner network
cons: API depth varies across product lines
UX is functional, not modern SaaS
review.verdict: A safe, mainstream accounting choice in Japan — broad and proven, but not a modern API platform.
review.best_for: Japanese SMBs wanting mainstream accounting with some e-invoicing automation via MISOCA.
review.not_for: International teams or developers expecting a cloud-native, API-first product.
